__NOTOC__

== Blocks ==
<div class="cubyz-section">
Blocks are the building materials of the Cubyz world. From natural terrain to crafted structures, explore all available blocks below.

=== All Blocks ===
<div class="cubyz-category-list">
<categorytree mode=pages depth=0>Blocks</categorytree>
</div>
</div>

== Items ==
<div class="cubyz-section">
Items are objects you can hold, craft with, and use. From tools to resources, discover everything you can find or create.

=== All Items ===
<div class="cubyz-category-list">
<categorytree mode=pages depth=0>Items</categorytree>
</div>
</div>

== Tools ==
<div class="cubyz-section">
Tools help you interact with the world more effectively. Each tool has unique properties and uses.

=== All Tools ===
<div class="cubyz-category-list">
<categorytree mode=pages depth=0>Tools</categorytree>
</div>
</div>

== Browse by Type ==
{| class="wikitable cubyz-box-blue" style="width: 100%;"
|-
! class="cubyz-box-header cubyz-box-header-blue" colspan="3" | 🔍 Quick Navigation
|-
| style="width: 33%; padding: 20px; vertical-align: top;" |
'''[[:Category:Natural Blocks|Natural Blocks]]'''
* [[:Category:Terrain Blocks|Terrain]]
* [[:Category:Ores|Ores]]
* [[:Category:Plants|Plants]]

| style="width: 33%; padding: 20px; vertical-align: top; border-left: 1px solid #ddd;" |
'''Crafted Items'''
* [[:Category:Crafted Blocks|Crafted Blocks]]
* [[:Category:Decorative Blocks|Decorative Blocks]]
* [[:Category:Building Materials|Building Materials]]

| style="width: 33%; padding: 20px; vertical-align: top; border-left: 1px solid #ddd;" |
'''Tools & Utilities'''
* [[:Category:Tools|All Tools]]
* [[:Category:Functional Blocks|Functional Blocks]]
|}

== Contributing ==
<div class="cubyz-footer">
''Want to add a new block or item? Check out our [[Template:Infobox|Infobox Template]] and [[Help:Creating Pages|page creation guide]]!''
</div>

[[Category:Game Information]]
